content:
This styleguide example demonstrates the element structure. Replace it with a statement based on an audit of your own site before publishing. Desiderio provides semantic components, visible focus styles, alternative-text fields, and theme-token contrast checks; final WCAG 2.2 AA conformance depends on your content, configuration, integrations, and testing.

What Desiderio supports

  • Interactive components include keyboard and focus patterns that should be verified with your site's content and integrations.
  • Shared landmarks and heading conventions provide a sound structure; editors remain responsible for a logical page hierarchy.
  • Image fields expose alternative-text metadata, while decorative icons are hidden from assistive technology.
  • Automated structural and theme-token contrast tests help catch regressions.

What remains your responsibility

Editor-entered content, embedded media, uploaded documents, third-party extensions, and the complete user journey still require human review. This example does not replace a conformance audit or legal review.
